_comment: Copy this to scripts/backup.config.json (gitignored) and fill it in. backup.ps1 reads it.
_backupRemote: Name of the git remote that points at your PRIVATE backup repo (separate from 'origin', which deploys to Vercel). Create it once: git remote add backup https://github.com/<you>/mec-portal-backup.git
_driveDir: Folder inside a synced cloud drive (Google Drive for Desktop, or OneDrive). backup.ps1 drops a full git bundle + secrets here, so it syncs to the cloud automatically. Set to "" to skip the drive copy.
_keepBundles: How many timestamped .bundle snapshots to keep in driveDir before pruning the oldest.
_secrets: Gitignored files copied into driveDir/secrets ONLY (never to GitHub) so a laptop loss is fully recoverable.
_autoCommit: When true, backup.ps1 commits any working-tree changes before pushing to the backup remote (captures in-progress work). It NEVER pushes to origin, so it can't trigger a Vercel deploy.
